description: Style Notefootfun shoes for your little one are designed for maximum comfort and are hard wearing (you know the scrapes your little one can get into!) They're fashioned to make your child look as cute-as-a-button! Product DetailsSlip-on grey shoe with synthetic upper  Has elasticated strings on either sides of the tongue for a snug FitPadded tongue and collarTPU outsole with pointed and circular nubs at the forefoot and heel Material and careSyntheticWipe with a cotton swab to remove dus
